parts.text: Using your Playwright tools, open https://inmobiliariaiparralde.com/ Then, search for tipo de inmueble = piso and municipio = Hendaye, like in the image. Then click on Search and get me a table with results. The results are paginated but there are usually only a few pages (2-3). Write your steps into a playwright script in nodejs so that it can be run headlessly later to get the data. For each listing, extract the title, price, location, detail URL, scraping timestamp and a stable id derived from the detail URL. Output the results as an array of JSON objects.
